headline: P&L exposure: ₹45.0 Cr direct contract value + ₹13.5 Cr cost of capital benefit + ₹2.9 Cr green premium (engine estimate)
what_matters: No supply chain transmission; impact is direct to Adani Power's operational and financial profile.

P/E rerating potential of +0.1x; margin expansion by 10.0 bps; ₹45.0 Cr direct cashflow + ₹16.4 Cr green premium.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹45.0 Cr direct contract value + ₹13.5 Cr cost of capital benefit + ₹2.9 Cr green premium (engine estimate)
